title: cyathea marginalis
intro: Cyathea marginalis, also known as the palm-like tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyathea marginalis include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antifungal and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as extracts and infusions, are used to create remedies for various health issues, and it is also used in traditional ceremonies and rituals in some Pacific Island cultures.
